event_description: Lamine Yamal opened the scoring after an Oyarzabal delivery
Mikel Oyarzabal scored Spain's second goal
Hassan Altambakti scored an own goal in Spain's favour
Alex Baena scored after a low delivery from Marcos Llorente
Pedro Porro scored Spain's second goal
Substitute Mikel Merino scored the winning goal in second-half stoppage time
notes: Exact added-time minute not stated in the cited FIFA article.

event_description: Fabian Ruiz opened the scoring after Courtois saved Dani Olmo's attempt
Charles De Ketelaere equalised for Belgium
Mikel Merino scored the late winning goal
notes: English FIFA report records minute 88; Spanish article records 87. Project adopts match-report value and documents discrepancy.

event_description: Ferran Torres scored the World Cup-winning goal after Nico Williams headed down Pedro Porro's cross
notes: Pedro Porro supplied the initial cross; Nico Williams provided the final touch before the shot.
